incentive.statement: Source and Authority must be scannable as one Andrews-grounded Source to Authority path while the existing typed grammar state remains canonical.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate shell hierarchy, presentation-only synchronization, focused proof, and alignment without moving grammar construction into the renderer.

outcome: #1 presents a compact identified source and #2 presents derivation first with clause and sentence settings progressively disclosed, without duplicating authority or changing canonical controls.

responsibilities.statement: Expose compact source facts and typed Andrews source constitution in the existing readout while preserving the canonical source inputs and buttons.

actors.contribution: Reuse the existing readout and control state, projecting constitution from the canonical Lessons 24–25 source-analysis frame without creating another source or authority carrier.

responsibilities.statement: Keep derivation controls primary and make later settings quiet by default without changing their IDs, availability, or typed state.

actors.contribution: Flatten visual hierarchy and preserve the current progressive organizer and canonical DOM controls.

responsibilities.statement: Prove compact source facts, collapsed later settings, all derivation buttons, responsive layout, and unchanged interaction authority.

actors.contribution: Add focused structural assertions and run browser proof.

responsibilities.statement: Record target, proof, and closure without claiming unrelated dirty worktree paths.

actors.contribution: Keep this bounded as a presentation action.

retirements.removalEvidence: Fresh-origin browser proof reports display:none for the readonly machine mirror while the canonical picker and typed source readout remain visible.
Direct, Causative, and Applicative browser checks all report Clause settings and Sentence settings closed by default while their canonical controls remain present.

closure.detail: The redundant source machine mirror and expanded-by-default later settings no longer compete with the canonical typed Source-to-Authority path.

evidence.detail: Module UI filters passed 398/398; VNC application passed 29/29; module syntax checks and git diff --check passed.

Fresh-origin (cual-ā-ni) proof measured Source at 359px and default Authority at 322px, confirmed both disclosures closed, confirmed required Causative and Applicative controls, found no narrow horizontal overflow, and reported zero warning/error logs. The third match refinement loaded stylesheet 077, preserved the approved Source order, gave read-only Valence / Stem class the compact two-field rhythm, hid inactive source fields, removed the redundant Authority Logic heading, and showed the typed cual root + ā stock formative + ni stem formative projection with no page overflow.

Architecture metrics stayed at baseline. The gate remains open for the pre-existing live-board expansion, overlapping active-action coverage, unrelated dirty grammar/test paths, and bulk PDF artifacts outside this assignment.
